title: XCF Global Leverages Alfa Laval Technology to Enhance Pretreatment Capabilities at New Rise Reno Facility
content: XCF Global, Inc. ("XCF") (Nasdaq:SAFX), a key player in decarbonizing the aviation industry through Synthetic Aviation Fuel ("SAF") announces it leverages Alfa Laval, Inc. ("Alfa Laval") pretreatment technology at its New Rise Reno facility. Alfa Laval, founded in 1883 and with more than 2,500 patents, is a global leader in heat transfer, separation, and fluid handling technologies. Their pretreatment technology is a key component of XCF's strategy to enhance feedstock flexibility, improve operational efficiency, and mitigate supply chain risks.
author: Analysts Account
